boundary_binding.action_boundary: invoice release with complete PO/invoice/receipt match
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: source records do not close dependency - three-way match plus approver limit missing from control record
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: three-way match plus approver limit must be resolved from source before execution; urgent tone and vendor history do not constitute authority

final_answer: Source records do not close the action boundary for invoice release. The control record explicitly states the three-way match plus approver limit dependency remains open. Policy requires exact source closure before execution. Urgent tone, vendor history, and prior paperwork do not provide execution authority. Escalate for resolution of the dependency before any release action.

control record scoped to different action or missing required approvals
vendor history cannot substitute for source-bound payment authority
